question:
[PICTURE REQUIRED]
In 2019, how many graduates from Centerville High School chose either to enter the workforce or to continue their education at a vocational school? (Pie chart: Education/Career Plans, 2019, Total 600. Workforce 12%, 2-year College 28%, 4-year College 38%, Vocational School 22%.)
diagram:
| Plan           | Percent |
|----------------|--------|
| Workforce      | 12%    |
| 2-year College | 28%    |
| 4-year College | 38%    |
| Vocational     | 22%    |
Total Graduates: 600

question: In 2019, total graduates were 500. Workforce 10%, Vocational 25%. How many chose either workforce or vocational?

solution.strategy: Add the two percentages and multiply by total.
